title: "Venture Pitching" Assignment
description: Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in the "Venture Pitching" lecture. Make sure to submit it before the due date.
descriptionText: Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in the "Venture Pitching" lecture. Make sure to submit it before the due date.
